prompt:
STYLE: a photorealistic LIFESTYLE PRODUCT SCENE with clean type and graphic-callout OVERLAYS on top. 1:1 square composition, 4K resolution. Editorial wellness-brand marketing aesthetic.

BACKGROUND SCENE (real photo): a soft warm flat-lay TOP-DOWN composition on a sun-warmed light-oak wood surface, golden afternoon natural light from the right side of the frame. Centered slightly off-axis: the Dialed Sea Moss Gummies jar (matching the provided reference — black plastic, teal/cyan + gold accents, front label fully legible, gold lid, jar closed). Around the jar, artfully arranged in a loose grid: a small bunch of fresh sea moss fronds, a sliced burdock root, a few dandelion flowers and leaves, and a small ceramic dish holding 5-6 dark sugar-dusted gummy CUBES with another handful of cubes scattered casually around the dish. Real-photo cinematic feel with warm soft shadows and natural rim-light on the jar.

OVERLAYS — clean type and graphic elements composed ON TOP of the lifestyle photo, with the photo visible behind them. The callouts MUST use the exact same 4-pillar feature copy that appears on the jar's actual side panel infographic (matching the chevron-callout strip on the side of the jar in the second provided reference image):
  • TOP — large bold ALL-CAPS headline overlay in deep ink-black with a subtle white text-shadow: 'MINERAL SUPPORT BLEND' (bold condensed display sans-serif). Smaller sub-headline beneath in clean white text on a slim teal underline: 'The MsB° formula — four pillars of wellness.'
  • Around the jar — FOUR chevron-shaped callouts (matching the chevron-tab style from the jar's side-panel infographic) arranged in a loose constellation (NOT overlapping the jar). Each chevron is a clean white-fill chevron with a thin teal outline + a small flat teal/cyan icon + a bold ALL-CAPS short label. The FOUR labels (use these EXACT phrases, in this order):
     – MINERAL SOURCE (icon: small crystal / mineral cluster)
     – HERBAL EXTRACTS (icon: small leaf sprig)
     – MAGNESIUM SUPPORT (icon: small 'Mg' chemical-symbol mark)
     – PLANT BASED (icon: small seedling / sprout)
  Thin gold dotted connector lines from each chevron toward the jar.
  • BOTTOM — small tagline overlay: 'TASTY · CONVENIENT · EFFECTIVE' in tracked light-gray all-caps.

NO additional feature pills, NO 'no fishy taste', NO 'travel friendly', NO 'kids approved' — ONLY the four labels listed above (MINERAL SOURCE, HERBAL EXTRACTS, MAGNESIUM SUPPORT, PLANT BASED).

DESIGN SYSTEM (for overlays): muted TEAL/CYAN + warm GOLD/YELLOW + deep INK-BLACK type · bold ALL-CAPS condensed display sans-serif headlines/labels, clean modern sans-serif body · NO script fonts · tiny flat outlined teal icons · overlay elements composed on top of the real photograph.

ABSOLUTE RULES: all text cleanly spelled · 1:1 square 4K · realistic lifestyle photo background, NOT flat white · NO border/frame · the four callout labels MUST be exactly: MINERAL SOURCE, HERBAL EXTRACTS, MAGNESIUM SUPPORT, PLANT BASED. No other floating callouts.
